# Prasad Kavuri — VP / Head of AI Engineering
# https://www.prasadkavuri.com

## About
AI Engineering Executive with 20+ years experience building
enterprise AI platforms, agentic systems, and global engineering
teams of 200+. Open to VP/Head of AI Engineering roles.

## Contact
Email: vbkpkavuri@gmail.com
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/pkavuri
Book a call: https://calendly.com/vbkpkavuri

## Key Experience
- Krutrim: Architected India's first Agentic AI platform, 200+ engineers
- Ola: 13,000+ B2B customers, 70% cost reduction
- HERE Technologies: 18 years, Sr Engineer to Director
